meaning: n.支持者,倚靠人,道具,螺旋桨vt.支撑,维持
examples: I lie still for a minute until I can breathe normally, then stretch my arms out to prop myself up.
Peacock feathers should never be brought on stage, either as a costume element, prop or part of a set as chaos will ensue.

South African-born Dragons prop Rhys Thomas is a surprise replacement for Adam Jones at tight-head.
